## Summary

Describe the problem and the solution in a few sentences.

## Scope

- [ ] Focused change with no unrelated refactor
- [ ] Private/local data is not included
- [ ] Existing data remains compatible or migration is documented

## Validation

- [ ] Python compilation passed
- [ ] JavaScript syntax checks passed
- [ ] Frontend monolith guard passed
- [ ] Public repository privacy guard passed
- [ ] Relevant regression checks passed
- [ ] Docker build and `/health` smoke passed, when applicable

## Privacy and security

Explain any effect on SQLite data, tokens, integrations, uploads, network exposure or BYOK keys. Write `None` when there is no impact.

## UI evidence

Add screenshots for meaningful visual changes. Use only synthetic or redacted data.
